nasb.text: Their line has gone out through all the earth, And their utterances to the end of the world. In them He has placed a tent for the sun,

esv.text: Their voice goes out through all the earth, and their words to the end of the world. In them he has set a tent for the sun,

cnv.text: 它們的聲音傳遍全地， 它們的言語傳到地極， 　神在它們中間為太陽安設帳幕。

ccb.text: 它们的声音传遍天下， 它们的话语传到地极。 上帝在天上为太阳设立居所。

csbs.text: 但它们的声音传遍全地， 它们的言语传到地极。 神在它们中间为太阳安设帐篷，
